MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Defts' Business Records Subpoena
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Orlando Hudson's motion to quash business records subpoena is granted in part. The subpoena is modified. Remediation Services Inc. shall not provide records of performance evaluations and disciplinary actions. The remaining categories of documents described in the subpoena shall be produced within 10 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Set For Trial On Feb-04-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-18-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Continued To Dec-12-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Df'S Medical And Insurance Records Subpoenas
Off Calendar Jun-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Orlando Hudson's motion to quash subpoenas to Steven Feinberg M.D. and Specialty Risk Services is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patrick J. Suter, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Orlando Hudson
Amy Skryja, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Sunset Scavenger Company

HEARING HELD and Plaintiff Orlando Hudson's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents to defendant Sunset Scavenger (set #1) and to defendant House (set #1) and form interrogatories (set #1) is taken off calendar per stipulation of parties. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-22-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-04-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 622

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-23-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
